scripts.package:chrome: bun run build:chrome && cd dist && zip -r ../dissatisfied-chrome.zip . && cd ..
scripts.package:firefox: bun run build:firefox && cd dist-firefox && zip -r ../dissatisfied-firefox.zip . && cd ..
scripts.package:firefox:review: NODE_ENV=production FIREFOX_FOR_REVIEW=1 bun build.ts firefox && cd dist-firefox && zip -r ../dissatisfied-firefox-for-review.zip . && cd ..
scripts.package:safari: bun run build:safari && cd dist-safari && zip -r ../dissatisfied-safari.zip . && cd ..
scripts.package:all: bun run build:all && cd dist && zip -r ../dissatisfied-chrome.zip . && cd .. && cd dist-firefox && zip -r ../dissatisfied-firefox.zip . && cd .. && cd dist-safari && zip -r ../dissatisfied-safari.zip . && cd ..
scripts.format: oxfmt -c .oxfmtrc.json --write build.ts src website/src package.json website/package.json website/astro.config.mjs
scripts.format:check: oxfmt -c .oxfmtrc.json --check build.ts src website/src package.json website/package.json website/astro.config.mjs
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check
